programmes.show_description: On the 'box this time: Squid Game: The Challenge, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, The Crown, Deal or No Deal, Planet Earth III, Made in Chelsea and Saving Lives at Sea.
What do Britain's top armchair critics think of Squid Game: The Challenge, The Couple Next Door, The Toy Hospital, Survivor, Vinnie Jones in the Country and Lorraine?
(2020) Paul WS Anderson's sci-fi action starring Milla Jovovich, based on the game of the same name. A US Army Ranger must fight her way out of a parallel world full of monsters.
Unplugged: Claire and Phil challenge the family to a digital detox contest.
Mercedes wants to know what Jenson's up to. Warren makes a decision, but is he too late? Friends support Diane and Tony. And Rex experiments with his image for the first time in public.
Warren decides who he wants, but is he too late? Meanwhile, friends gather around to support Diane and Tony.
Rex braves his first public outing while experimenting with his image at an LGBTQ+ club night. And a shocking turn of events at The Loft relaunch party puts all eyes on Mercedes...
A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.
El Greco: Gordon Ramsay visits struggling Greek restaurant El Greco, where the owners have secretly recruited 'Chef Mike' the microwave to help them out on a daily basis.
Geoff the Pleaser: Geoff struggles to balance demands from the Jenkintown Posse and Erica. Adam faces a crisis of confidence over his career path.
The Preventa Mode: As Valentine's Day approaches, Barry is shocked when an attractive teaching assistant agrees to go out with him.
Fears: When Phil and Luke embark on a discovery expedition underneath the house, Phil tries not to let his fear of the dark and of creepy crawlies get the best of him.
Truth Be Told: After reconnecting on Facebook, Phil invites his old high school girlfriend to drop by the house, but the friendly visit quickly turns into trouble.
Brand new series: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages.
Sexual health advisor Liza meets father-of-five Simon. Singer Saskia dates Luke the magician. And a car buff from Grimsby meets a self-confessed 'nerd' who's yet to fall in love.
Michon's: Can Gordon help the unwell owner of a family-run Atlanta smokehouse address his daughter's hands-off management style?
24 Minutes: In a parody of the action series 24, Bart and Lisa must stop bullies releasing a stink bomb at school.
You Kent Always Say What You Want: After spilling coffee on his lap, Kent Brockman swears on live TV and gets fired. So Kent and Lisa team up to broadcast inconvenient truths.
The Kiss: In honour of her late grandmother, Gloria decides to cook traditional Colombian meals, which is met with some ribbing from Jay. And Claire becomes overbearing.
Earthquake: An earthquake traps Claire in the bathroom with the plumber. Manny has an existential crisis while he's out with Jay.
Brand new series: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages.

programmes.show_name: New: Dance Moms: A New Era
programmes.show_description: Brand new series - Out with the Bleu, in with the New: Coach Glo is under pressure to build a new project after the catastrophic end to Studio Bleu. Will her daughter Kaeli help?
Homer Goes to Prep School: Homer joins an off-the-grid survivalist group who have a top-secret doomsday bunker.
A Test Before Trying: When the school's threatened with closure because of low test scores, its fate rests with one student who missed the exam: Bart.
Can Warren trust Jenson? Diane makes a decision as her family struggle with her prognosis. And a resident is forced to reveal the truth.
...Australia - Brand new series: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit, leaving the experiment permanently shaken.
Brand new series: Jazz decides it's time to come clean about her feelings, but how will Inga react? Philip ramps up his feud with Chuggs. And Freddy's torn between Angus and Jack.
What do the Goggleboxers think of Squid Game: The Challenge, The Couple Next Door, Strictly Come Dancing, The Graham Norton Show, Planet Earth III, and Jingle All the Way?
Can police officer Mark cross the thin line between hate and love on a date with self-confessed 'nightmare' Abi? And will latex-loving Shirlie bond with her fellow divorcee Dave?
Brand new series: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit, leaving the experiment permanently shaken.
In the dating show that bares all, 20-year-old virgin Josh seeks a princess to help pop his cherry. And Matt and Mary look for a third person to join them in bed.
Brand new series: Jazz decides it's time to come clean about her feelings, but how will Inga react? Philip ramps up his feud with Chuggs. And Freddy's torn between Angus and Jack.
Geoff the Pleaser: Geoff struggles to balance demands from the Jenkintown Posse and Erica. Adam faces a crisis of confidence over his career path.
The Preventa Mode: As Valentine's Day approaches, Barry is shocked when an attractive teaching assistant agrees to go out with him.
The One in the Spanish Sea: Carl aims to marry Rebecca on the Med but she has expectations for a high-class affair. Will Carl's plans make a splash and make Rebecca swoon with delight?
Rex braves his first public outing while experimenting with his image at an LGBTQ+ club night. And a shocking turn of events at The Loft relaunch party puts all eyes on Mercedes...
Can Warren trust Jenson? Diane makes a decision as her family struggle with her prognosis. And a resident is forced to reveal the truth.
A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.
Michon's: Can Gordon help the unwell owner of a family-run Atlanta smokehouse address his daughter's hands-off management style?
Dave Kim's Party: With Dave Kim's parents out of town for the weekend, Adam decides to throw a giant party to impress Brea.
Body Swap: Adam is thrilled about William Penn's new open lunch policy. And Geoff gets more than he bargained for when he uses Barry's student ID.
Starry Night: Jay and Mitchell set out on their traditional father-son outing to see the meteor showers, but Mitchell is surprised to see that Manny will be joining them.
Game Changer: Mitchell decides to toughen up, Cameron gets involved in a neighbour's marital problems, and it's Jay against Gloria and Manny in chess.
Brand new series: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit, leaving the experiment permanently shaken.
Cake-maker Fiona is a self-confessed 'princess' while Jessica loves lager and football and doesn't want to change. How do they get along on their first dates with Rakim and Ryan?
Zocalo: Gordon Ramsay visits a floundering Mexican restaurant which has become an albatross around the necks of its owners, married couple Greg and Mary Russell.
Moonshine River: Marge and Lisa try to experience all of New York City's culture when the family travel to the Big Apple looking for Bart's long-lost love Mary Spuckler.
This Little Wiggy: Bart is invited to the Wiggum household and finds it filled with police equipment: a troublemaker's paradise.
Strangers on a Treadmill: Claire and Mitchell help each other spare their partners from embarrassment - Cameron from wardrobe choices, and Phil from his estate agents' speech.
Brand new series: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit, leaving the experiment permanently shaken.

programmes.show_name: New: Dance Moms: A New Era
programmes.show_description: Brand new series - Cry Miah River: A fresh rivalry is born when a new dancer arrives. Except she's not so new to Gina, who has a history with her new teammate...
The Changing of the Guardian: After surviving a tornado, Marge and Homer seek out guardians for the kids, in case the worst should ever happen to them.
Love Is a Many-Splintered Thing: Bart's heartstrings are pulled once again when Mary Spuckler returns to Springfield, but he doesn't pay her enough attention.
With things looking up, Donny proposes to Misbah, but it's not long before their bubble bursts... Elsewhere, Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home, and a relationship is on the rocks.
...Australia - Brand new series: Two new couples join the experiment. But when big personalities clash, the marriages threaten to unravel before the honeymoons have even begun...
Brand new series: Vicky and her husband Ercan face a big decision; should they start a family? Vicky gives motherhood a trial run and sees how her frozen embryos are getting on. (Ep1/2)
Charlotte says she has no gender boundaries but when her date, Charlie, tells her that he's a trans man, Charlotte is uncharacteristically speechless, at least initially...
In the Naked Attraction studio, former club rep Chris hopes to meet someone to settle down with. Technophobe Louise wants an old-fashioned gentleman to sweep her off her feet.
